title: space_set: wrap update_space_props + apply_member_patch in one SQLite transaction
description: RFC 8620 §7.1 requires that a notUpdated response means no writes occurred. Currently, if update_space_props succeeds and a subsequent apply_member_patch returns a store/DB error, the name/description change is already committed but notUpdated is returned — a partial write. Fix requires a combined store method that accepts both prop changes and member changes and executes them in a single BEGIN/COMMIT. The partial-write can only be triggered by a genuine DB error (disk full, constraint violation), which is rare in practice. See comment at jmap.rs:1157 for full context.
